name: Zooplop
author: Poki
description: Zooplop is a cute merging puzzle game where animals drop down unexpectedly! You need to carefully put them together so they will merge into bigger ones! A mouse plus a mouse will turn into a yellow chicken, and chickens can become larger crabs! Keep combining them until you reach the ultimate goal: the majestic whale! How big can you make them? Can you reach the huge whale? How to play Zooplop? To move the animals, left-click and hold your mouse, then release it to drop them. Alternatively, you can use the A/D keys or the left and right arrow keys to move the animals, and the S key or the down arrow key to drop them! Who created Zooplop? Zooplop is created by Venturous. Play their other game on Poki: Gobdun , Catpad , and Cubies ! How can I play Zooplop for free? You can play Zooplop for free on Poki. Can I play Zooplop on mobile devices and desktop? Zooplop can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
